author: gm
events_i_witnessed: Maren Solvig bypassed locked lockers in the lower maintenance wing and discovered her childhood hand-carved wooden bird.
Tomas Solvig emerged from the shadows of the boiler bypass, gaunt, shivering, afflicted by a crystalline frost, and clutching a sealed brass canister.
Corwin Tarrow suffered a critical failure on Insight, experiencing a violent sensory overload with hallucinations of writhing salt-worms and deafening metallic shrieks.
beliefs: Maren is highly focused on rescuing Tomas but must navigate his extreme paranoia and defensive stance.
Corwin is dangerously close to succumbing to the deep springs' Influence and cannot currently assist or perceive the situation accurately.
Tomas Solvig's brass canister contains high-grade primordial salt that he will defend with his life.
The environment below is actively hostile, projecting physical salt-frost and deep mental distortions.
open_threads: Maren's confrontation and negotiation with her paranoid brother Tomas.
Corwin's recovery from his acute sensory and psychological overload.
Discovering the true nature and threat of the crystalline frost growing on Tomas.
Managing the threat of the silent, waiting clerk upstairs and the missing foreman Mr. Vance.
